body:
Documentation:
- New README (badges, quick start, features, design principles) and logo
- Restructure docs into getting-started, how-to, and design-philosophy pages
- Revise docstrings throughout to follow CliMA documentation policy
- Correct stale docs (MPI auto-detection was removed; FileLogger export)

Bug fixes (with regression tests):
- Add missing abort method for SingletonCommsContext
- Base.summary(io, device) now prints to io per the Base contract
- FileLogger no longer crashes when an MPI run reuses a log_dir
- Invalid coarsen option throws ArgumentError instead of StackOverflowError
- Singleton reduce/allreduce/gather return copies, matching MPI methods

Compat/CI:
- Raise minimum Julia to 1.10 (LTS) and test 1.10 - 1.12 in CI

Closes #92, #88, #107
title: Update documentation and fix bugs found during audit
